message: The other day, I was making dinner and got a little too caught up in my favorite podcast. Suddenly, I smelled something burning! I rushed into the kitchen to find my dinner in a bit of a smoky predicament. Thankfully, our smoke alarm promptly went off, and it reminded me how important it is to keep those batteries fresh. It was a small panic, but it turned into a little win when I realized we had an escape plan in place. We practiced it just last month, so I felt calm knowing everyone knew what to do. Just a little reminder that staying prepared can really save the day! Have you checked your smoke alarm lately?
